I need to be careful with the parameters for `rotate-first-pass` and `rotate-second-pass`.
For `rotate-first-pass`:
`?nstart` is the node where rotation started (e.g. n1).
`?r` is the rotation (clockwise).
`?n1` is the node being processed (e.g. n2).
`?n2` is the next node (e.g. n3).
`?n2x`, `?n2y` are current coordinates of `?n2`.
`?n2dir` is current heading of `?n2`.
`?n2setdir` is new heading of `?n2`.

For `rotate-second-pass`:
`?n1` is the node whose position is known (e.g. n2).
`?n1x`, `?n1y` are its coordinates.
`?n1dir` is its heading.
`?n2` is the node to be positioned (e.g. n3).
`?n2x`, `?n2y` are its new coordinates.
